Gemini Test

A multimodal test model.

Model ID gemini-test
Modalities TextInput and output ImageInput and output
Token limits global: 65.536K maximum output, 1 million context length
Maximum output tokens 65.536K
Capabilities
  • Thinking Supported
  • Function calling Supported
  • Computer use Supported
Versions gemini-test Launch stage: GA Release date: July 21, 2026
